race.comment: BEDAZZLED JEWEL (8) returned a better run last time, finishing in the money (17.75) at this track behind Giggling Dixie in a Mix 3/4. Has the pace to be prominent. Sure to be about the mark. STOLE MY BONE (2) is struggling to break through but racing consistently, finishing in the minors three starts on end. Last time out flew the lids with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when second (17.69) at this track over 300m. Will give a great sight again. SHE'S SILKY (1) showed little early speed at her last couple, the latest finishing eighth (18.12) in a Grade 5 at this track. Can measure up this time. MARVELLOUS DUNN (5) has won at this course and distance, should be thereabouts.
